.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Refactored string concatenation for the default download URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Simplified the definition of file path constants by removing unnecessary line breaks.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH defined on single lines.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Consolidated the error message print statement for directory creation failure.
Adjusted indentation and formatting of the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Re-indented the new Authenticator() block and its getPasswordAuthentication method.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of strings that might contain CRLF injection sequences.
Modify active profiles retrieval to fall back to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring the log message is never empty.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed '\'' to ''' in the error message string literal.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 compatibility.
Remove the explicit registration of ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule, likely because they are now auto-configured or no longer needed in the updated framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Refactor security configuration from the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to the modern SecurityFilterChain bean approach required by Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support method-level security in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicitly set the CsrfTokenRequestAttributeHandler to fix compatibility with newer Spring Security CSRF handling.
Remove custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler/FailureHandler and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler beans, likely replacing them with standard HTTP status-based handlers or filters.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Bean methods for ajaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, ajaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and ajaxLogoutSuccessHandler

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the integration of SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling, likely moving error handling to a global controller advice or different mechanism.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Import(SecurityProblemSupport.class) and references to problemSupport in exceptionHandling()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add a custom SpaWebFilter to handle Single Page Application routing or security requirements within the filter chain.
Add a CookieCsrfFilter to the security chain to handle CSRF token retrieval from cookies in a standardized way.
Simplify the constructor by removing dependencies on CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport which are no longer used in the configuration.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" with explicit extension patterns like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted wildcards for content/i18n.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security/Cors APIs.
Update CORS registration to use Swagger UI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2 endpoints.
